children.text: Once upon a time, an emperor liked clothes very much.
children.cn: 从前，有一位皇帝非常喜欢衣服。
children.notes: Once upon a time 是讲故事时常用的开头。
children.statement: liked 是 like 的过去分词，不能作谓语。
children.explanation: liked 在这里是过去式，在句中作谓语。

children.text: He wanted to buy some new clothes.
children.notes: wanted to do sth. 想要做某事。
children.statement: wanted to buy 中的 to buy 是动词不定式。
children.explanation: want 后面接不定式 to do 做宾语。

children.text: Two brothers came and lied to him, 'We can make wonderful clothes!'
children.cn: 两个兄弟来了，并对他撒了谎：'我们可以做奇妙的衣服！'
children.notes: lied 是 lie 的过去式。
children.explanation: lied（撒谎）的原形是 lie；lay 的过去式是 laid。

children.text: 'But only clever people can see them!'
children.cn: '但是只有聪明的人才能看见它们！'
children.statement: clever 是形容词，在句中修饰 people。
children.explanation: 形容词常用来修饰名词。

children.text: They pretended to make the clothes.
children.explanation: 这是规则动词，过去式加 -ed。

children.text: The emperor's officials couldn't see the clothes, but they said, 'What lovely clothes!'
children.cn: 皇帝的官员们看不见衣服，但是他们说：'多么可爱的衣服啊！'
children.statement: couldn't 是 can't 的过去式否定形式。
children.explanation: could 是 can 的过去式。

children.text: The emperor couldn't see anything either, but he said, 'They're beautiful!'
children.cn: 皇帝也看不见任何东西，但是他说：'它们真漂亮！'
children.notes: either 用于否定句末，表示'也'。
children.statement: either 在这里的意思是“也”，用于肯定句末。
children.explanation: either 表示“也”时，通常用于否定句末；肯定句末用 too。

children.text: No one wanted to look silly.
children.cn: 没有人想让自己显得愚蠢。
children.statement: silly 是形容词，在 look 后面作表语。
children.explanation: look 是连系动词，后面接形容词作表语。

children.text: The emperor decided to show everyone his new clothes.
children.cn: 皇帝决定向大家展示他的新衣服。
children.notes: decided to do sth. 决定做某事。
children.explanation: 在这里 show 是动词，表示“展示”。

children.text: People in the street praised them.
children.cn: 街上的人们都在赞美它们。
children.statement: praised 是 praise 的过去式。
children.explanation: 符合一般过去时的动词变化规则。

children.text: They were afraid to look silly too!
children.explanation: afraid 是形容词，常与 be 动词连用。

children.text: Suddenly, a boy shouted, 'Look! The emperor has no clothes on!'
children.cn: 突然，一个男孩喊道：'看！皇帝没穿衣服！'
children.statement: Suddenly 是副词，修饰整个句子。
children.explanation: -ly 结尾的单词通常是副词。

children.statement: one another 表示“三者或三者以上之间的互相”。
children.explanation: each other 常指两者之间，one another 常指三者或以上。

children.statement: laughing 是动词 laugh 的现在分词形式。
children.explanation: start doing sth. 表示开始做某事，laughing 在此作宾语。
